items.label: Wall off thread
items.description: Preview, lock, or remove a comment and its replies with ReddWall.

items.label: Raise ReddWall
items.description: Contain a risky post with preview, phrase targeting, locks, removals, and strict crowd control.

items.label: Recent ReddWall Activity
items.description: View the latest ReddWall previews and moderation runs for this subreddit.

defaultPhrases.label: Default target phrases
defaultPhrases.helpText: Pre-fill ReddWall phrase targeting. Separate phrases with commas or new lines.

defaultPreviewOnly.label: Preview by default
defaultPreviewOnly.helpText: Open ReddWall forms in preview mode first.

defaultLockPost.label: Lock posts by default
defaultLockPost.helpText: Only affects the post-level Raise ReddWall action.

defaultStrictCrowdControl.label: Strict crowd control by default
defaultStrictCrowdControl.helpText: Only affects the post-level Raise ReddWall action.
